B 80

KEKE'S BREAKFAST CAFE

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: January 13, 2026

KEKE'S BREAKFAST CAFE is a American restaurant at 1005 SPRING VILLAS POINT in Winter Springs, Seminole County, in Central Florida. At its most recent health inspection on January 13, 2026, it received a grade of B with a score of 80 out of 100. The inspection noted 4 intermediate and 8 basic violations. By health score, it is safer than 19% of Seminole County restaurants. Diners give it an average rating of 4.8 stars across 4891 reviews. Typical prices fall in the $10–20 range. Menu options are noted as suitable for vegetarian, organic, and healthy diners.

Inspections trending: declining · last inspected 165 days ago

Get directions Call (407) 696-1400

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. January 13, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    0 high-priority · 4 intermediate · 8 basic

    • 10 — In-use food dispensing utensils properly stored (×2)
    • 16 — Dishwashing facilities; sanitizer test kits; gauges (×2)
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized (×2)
    • 23 — Nonfood-contact surfaces clean
    • 31 — Handwash sinks accessible; handwashing supplies & sign provided (×2)
    • 33 — Garbage and refuse; premises maintained
    • 35 — Insects/rodents/pests; outer openings protected against pests
    • 53 — Food manager certification; employee food-safety training

  2. August 26, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    0 high-priority · 0 intermediate · 2 basic

    • 13 — Clean clothes; hair restraints; jewelry; fingernails
    • 24 — Storage & handling of clean equipment and utensils; air drying
